root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด

user_1.text: ทะเบียน จนท.ผู้ตรวจสอบ

user_2.text: ทะเบียน หัวหน้าฝ่าย

text_2.text: เหตุผลการขอหนังสือรับรอง

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as fname , pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as id_card , '!text_1!' as text_1 , '!text_2!' as text_2 , to_snumber(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)) as sharestock , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as member_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name('!user_1!') as user_1 , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name('!user_2!') as user_2 , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!data_date!','dd Month yyyy') as thaidate , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!date_edit!','dd Month yyyy') as dateedit , '!position!' as position
, ( select COUNT( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) AS count_contract_no
, ( select TO_SNUMBER( SUM( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_request_amount ) ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) AS loan_request_amount
, ( select TO_SNUMBER( SUM( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ) ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) AS principal_balance
, ( select TO_SNUMBER( SUM( sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount ) ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) AS period_payment_amount
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where 1=1 /*WHERE*/
